name: Christian Muthspiel
abstract: Christian Muthspiel (born 1962 in Judenburg, Austria) is an Austrian composer, trombonist, and pianist most associated with jazz. He started with the piano at six and began study of the trombone at 11.

about_quotes.speaker: Bley Carla
about_quotes.evidence: It was a guy from Austria, Christian Muthspiel ­ trombone player - he came to me after the show and said...
